summary: Backend testing for Service-to-Gallery tier system and watermark features completed. All 13 tests PASSED. Fixed a bug in the claim-queue endpoint where the GalleryItem.spot relationship was not being eagerly loaded, causing a MissingGreenlet error.
critical_code_review_comments: Watermark service correctly generates 1080p max dimension images (verified: 1080x720)
Service-to-Gallery tier mapping works correctly: scheduled→PRO, on_demand/live_join→STANDARD
PRO tier items have max_photo_quality='high' and max_video_quality='4k'
STANDARD tier items have max_photo_quality='standard' and max_video_quality='1080p'
Unpaid items return watermarked JPEG directly (image/jpeg content-type)
Purchased items return JSON with preview_url and is_watermarked=false
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/surfer_gallery.py - Fixed claim-queue endpoint to eagerly load GalleryItem.spot relationship
seed_data_creation: Test data was seeded using /app/backend/scripts/seed_gallery_test_data.py - Sean Stanhope has 5 gallery items: 2 PRO tier (1 paid, 1 unpaid), 3 STANDARD tier (2 paid, 1 unpaid)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service-to-Gallery tier system fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/gallery/watermarked-preview/{item_id} returns watermarked JPEG for unpaid items, JSON for purchased. /api/surfer-gallery/my-gallery/{surfer_id} returns items with gallery_tier, is_paid, access_type fields. Claim queue endpoint fixed to properly load nested relationships.

tests_passed: Returns JSON with preview_url for purchased items
Returns items with correct tier info (gallery_tier, max_photo_quality, max_video_quality)
Scheduled bookings map to PRO tier
On-demand bookings map to STANDARD tier
Live join bookings map to STANDARD tier

claim_queue_endpoint.fix_applied: Added selectinload for GalleryItem.spot relationship to prevent MissingGreenlet error

watermark_dimensions.verified: Images are resized to max 1080px on longest edge (tested: 1080x720)

bug_fixed.issue: MissingGreenlet error when accessing gi.spot.name without eager loading
bug_fixed.root_cause: The GalleryItem.spot relationship was not being eagerly loaded in the selectinload chain
